# CWE-359 safe: Exposure of Private Personal Information to an Unauthorized Actor (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-359-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"errors"
	"net/http"
)

type PersonRecord struct {
	Email string `json:"email"`
	SSN   string `json:"ssn"`
	Phone string `json:"phone"`
}

type PublicPersonView struct {
	Email string `json:"email"`
}

func RenderAccountDetails(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) error {
	requester := r.Header.Get("X-User-ID")
	target := r.URL.Query().Get("id")
	if requester != target {
		return errors.New("forbidden")
	}
	var row PersonRecord
	err := db.QueryRow("SELECT email, ssn, phone FROM people WHERE id = ?", target).Scan(&row.Email, &row.SSN, &row.Phone)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusNotFound)
		return err
	}
	out, _ := json.Marshal(PublicPersonView{Email: row.Email})
	w.Write(out)
	return nil
}
